ques: Identify a new open-source project on GitHub related to 'AI agriculture' that created in 2022, and note its main programming language and description.
answer: microsoft/farmvibes-ai — a new open-source GitHub project created in 2022. Main language: Jupyter Notebook. Description: "FarmVibes.AI: Multi-Modal GeoSpatial ML Models for Agriculture and Sustainability" (fuses satellite, drone, and weather data to build geospatial ML insights for agriculture/farming and sustainability).
